name: Coca Way Park
description: Coca Way Park is a place to play pickleball in Cataula, GA. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Harris County Community Center
description: Harris County Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hamilton, GA. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
